title: Whistler (disambiguation)
content:
'''Whistler''' has several different uses:

*[[Whistler]] - [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]]
*[[Whistler (Ortolan)]] - [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]]
*[[Whistler's Whirlpool Tapcafe]] - [[Tapcafe/Legends|Tapcafe]] owned by the Ortolan [[Whistler (Ortolan)|Whistler]]
*[[Jorm Whistler Mackenni]] - [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]
*[[Kayven whistler]] - Flying creature

{{Disambig}}
